name: access_key_encrypted_ses_smtp_password_v4

name: ssh_key_fingerprint
description: The MD5 message digest of the SSH public key

name: arn
description: The ARN assigned by AWS for this user

name: unique_id

name: access_key_ses_smtp_password_v4
description: The secret access key converted into an SES SMTP password by applying AWS's Sigv4 conversion algorithm

name: ssh_key_public_key_id
description: The unique identifier for the SSH public key

name: login_profile_key_fingerprint
description: The fingerprint of the PGP key used to encrypt the password

name: access_key_status
description: Active or Inactive. Keys are initially active, but can be made inactive by other means

name: access_key_fingerprint
description: The fingerprint of the PGP key used to encrypt the secret
